Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hotfix v0.4.9 — fix tools hanging on Telegram/Discord/Slack (#570)

* Fix memory tools hanging on Telegram/Discord/Slack (#569)

* fix(agent): always bypass permissions in headless mode

The Claude SDK backend only activated bypassPermissions when the
bypass_permissions setting was explicitly true (defaults to false).
Without it, tool calls needing approval (like Bash — used for memory
save, web search, etc.) hang indefinitely on messaging channels
(Telegram, Discord, Slack) because there's no terminal to show the
permission prompt. The agent then reports "trouble accessing memory
tools" because the tool call never completes.

PocketPaw always runs headless — the PreToolUse security hook still
blocks dangerous commands regardless of permission mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add regression tests for headless permission bypass

6 tests verify the fix works:
- Source inspection confirms permission_mode is unconditional
- Subprocess round-trip: remember → recall via CLI dispatcher
- Timeout guard catches the hang bug (5s limit)

Tests fail on the old code (conditional bypass) and pass on the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hotfix release — fixes tool permissions hanging on messaging channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Internal Link Scanner feature to editor

- New Supabase edge function: scan-internal-links
  - Auto-discovers pages via sitemap (tries /sitemap.xml, /sitemap_index.xml,
    /sitemap, sitemap index children) or crawls homepage links as fallback
  - Fetches up to 20 pages concurrently, extracts title/description/snippet
  - AI analyzes current content against discovered pages and returns up to 8
    internal link suggestions with exact anchor text and relevance reason
  - Validates anchor text is a verbatim content substring before returning

- New component: InternalLinksPanel
  - Collapsible panel in editor right sidebar, below SEO Analyzer
  - URL input + optional sitemap URL input for faster/more complete scans
  - Shows scan phase (crawling pages / analyzing with AI) during loading
  - Suggestion cards show page title, anchor text, reason, and Insert Link button
  - DOM TreeWalker to find and wrap anchor text in <a> without touching
    existing links or heading text
  - Insert All button when multiple unapplied suggestions remain
  - Applied / not-found states per suggestion

- EditorPage: import + mount InternalLinksPanel in right column

fix(video-swap): prevent Bull job stalling and fix I2V base64 encoding

- Add lockDuration (10min), stalledInterval (5min), maxStalledCount to
  VIDEO_SWAP queue — Modal calls take 5-15min, default 30s lock caused
  stalling
- Add extendLock() calls between each pipeline step to keep lock fresh
- Convert R2 URL to base64 data URL before sending to Modal I2V endpoint
  — Modal cannot reach R2 directly, was causing PIL.UnidentifiedImageError
- Add E2E and integration test scripts for full pipeline validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ENG-32): knowledge graph query-time traversal for relational recall

Add GraphRecallService that extracts entity names from queries using
simple NER heuristics, searches the knowledge graph for matching entities,
and retrieves memories attached to those entities and their 1-hop neighbors.

Wire graph recall into the MemoryQueryService recall pipeline so vector
search results are merged with graph-sourced memories, with a 1.2x score
boost for memories appearing in both result sets. Feature-gated behind
GRAPH_RETRIEVAL_ENABLED env var (default false).

Coordinate skill now uses !`command` syntax to inject DELTAS.md,
repo info, labels, and delta analysis directly into the prompt
instead of having the agent execute them at runtime.

Feedback checker no longer filters by coordinator account since
user and coordinator share the same GitHub account — relies
exclusively on timestamps to detect new activity.

feat(ENG-31): memory durability classification — DURABLE vs EPHEMERAL scoring

Rule-based classifier labels memories as DURABLE or EPHEMERAL at ingest,
then applies configurable score multipliers during retrieval so that
long-lived facts and preferences surface above generic filler.

- Add MemoryDurability enum + fields to Prisma schema
- DurabilityClassifierService: regex-based, sync, zero API cost
- Fire-and-forget classification in MemoryService.remember()
- Durability multiplier in RecallWeightService (gated by DURABILITY_BOOST_ENABLED)
- 36 unit tests covering preferences, facts, entities, edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close last sorry (10) hVlasov: Maxwellian in kernel of Landau operator (1→0)

Proved LandauOperator eM = 0 via projection annihilation: the bracket
eM(w)·∇eM(v') - eM(v')·∇eM(w) = scalar·(v'-w), and A(z)·z = 0.
All 22 files, ~8,300 lines, 0 sorry's. Fully verified by Lean 4 kernel.

commit.message:
feat(ENG-29): cross-encoder reranking via TEI rerank API

Add RerankService that calls a configurable TEI reranking endpoint
(BAAI/bge-reranker-base) to re-score top-20 bi-encoder candidates
using a cross-encoder, improving Precision@5 without sacrificing
Recall@20.

- RerankService with graceful degradation, 2s timeout, debug logging
- Wired into MemoryQueryService recall pipeline (after insight surfacing)
- Controlled via RERANK_ENABLED and RERANK_URL env vars (default: off)
- Full unit test coverage (reordering, degradation, timeout, empty input)

* 근거 번호 검증으로 존재하지 않는 근거 인용(환각) 감지
* 스트리밍 호환: 토큰 실시간 표시 → 완료 후 구조화 UI 전환
* ANALYSIS.md 코드베이스 대조 분석 + Output Parser 구현 기록 추가

* output-parser.js 유닛 테스트 4건 통과 (JSON 파싱, 마크다운 폴백, 환각 감지, 코드블록 JSON)
* rag.js 모듈 로드 정상 확인

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rebalance S1L1 for better first-level experience

- Speed 200→160 (matches base, L2 won't feel slower)
- maxSpawnPct 0.80→0.85 (less empty tunnel at end)
- Removed dead contentChance (all segments use contentCount)
- Seg2: hazard 80→40, added rings 40, core stays 20, contentCount 0→1
  Wider lane steps (-0.2/-0.3 → -0.4/0.5) for better tube coverage
- Seg4: 4 lanes→3, spacing 60→70 (less overwhelming ring shower)

Hand-crafted letterforms with one dot per stroke position.

All content sections restyled for light background.

feat(katachi): delegate PR updates and feedback polling to specialized agents

Add pr-updater and feedback-checker haiku agents to handle GitHub PR
interactions in the coordinate workflow. The coordinator now delegates
commits/PR updates and feedback polling instead of doing them inline,
simplifying the orchestration logic. Also switches to a single PR-based
review channel for all phases and bumps poll interval to 10 minutes.

Version bump: katachi 3.5.1 → 3.5.2, marketplace 2.12.6 → 2.12.7
